warning_text: Recurring seal failure pattern detected on centrifugal pumps operating above 85% load for >72 hours. Three prior incidents resulted in unplanned shutdowns. Recommend load reduction or proactive seal inspection.
Compressor bearing degradation pattern matches two prior incidents that escalated to full bearing seizure within 10 days of first vibration anomaly. Immediate inspection advised.

CRITICAL KNOWLEDGE CLIFF: Only one engineer (EMP-0042) holds institutional knowledge for motor rotor winding repair procedure. Four incidents handled exclusively by this individual. Succession risk is HIGH.
Heat exchanger fouling rate has increased 40% compared to baseline. Pattern partially matches 2024 incident. Monitor tube-side differential pressure closely.
